# Insightive Software

> Fit-built software engineered for how you actually work, handed over with full ownership. Insightive sells no software and carries no vendor margin: it either advises, or it builds. Priority markets: Pakistan, the UAE and Saudi Arabia.

## Services
- [Advisory](https://insightive.io/services/advisory): vendor-neutral technology decisions (stay, extend or build) backed by a financial model.
- [Build](https://insightive.io/services/build): fit-built software at Process, System and Platform scale, owned outright with full handover of code, data and infrastructure.

## Industries
- [Retail & Commerce](https://insightive.io/industries/retail-commerce): commerce in cash-on-delivery markets, courier orchestration, tax-authority integration.
- [Real Estate](https://insightive.io/industries/real-estate): Gulf and South Asia rental operations, Ejari/Ejar, post-dated cheques, compliance-native platforms.
- [HR & Talent](https://insightive.io/industries/hr-talent): statutory payroll at scale, GCC compliance-native recruiting, AI-first HR operations.
- [Healthcare](https://insightive.io/industries/healthcare): infection-control surveillance, telehealth, AI-driven organizational wellness.
- [Education](https://insightive.io/industries/education): school management, assessment and learning-recommendation systems.

## Insights
- [The Thesis: Software That Fits. Software You Own.](https://insightive.io/thesis)
- [The Near-Fit Tax](https://insightive.io/insights/the-near-fit-tax)
- [Rent vs. Own: The Five-Year Math](https://insightive.io/insights/rent-vs-own-five-year-math)
- [The Anatomy of Lock-In](https://insightive.io/insights/anatomy-of-lock-in)
- [AI Didn't Make Software Cheaper. It Made Fit Affordable.](https://insightive.io/insights/ai-made-fit-affordable)
